summary: ccc_feedback should graduate from write-only JSONL into a bounded local reducer plus SQLite reweight table that applies clamped post-retrieval rerank deltas; raw JSONL remains audit input and cold start is no-op.

label: Current ccc_feedback schema supports weak path-class learning but lacks rank/score/query-id fields for precise result-rank learning
loc_estimate: ~25-45 optional derived-field writer work; ~0 for reducer-only MVP

label: Graduation should use a periodic reducer into SQLite rather than scanning JSONL during query-time rerank
Reweight table should key on intent_tag plus path_class and clamp additive rerank deltas to +/-0.10
Cold start and local privacy requirements both favor fail-closed zero-delta behavior with aggregate-only learned tables
Active feedback rerank should be feature-flagged and shadow/eval gated before default-on behavior
